prestazioni: RB26DETT engine: Full forged internals with Tomei 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-M 2.8L stroker crankshaft for a 2.8L displacement, paired with Tomei 1.5mm head gasket and ARP head studs for 13:1 compression ratio

Turbocharger upgrade: Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with 62mm billet compressor wheel, 82mm turbine, and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate, coupled with a Tomei 44mm external wastegate dump pipe and custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe

Fuel system: Nismo 550cc injectors (PN: 16600-21U00) with a Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, Tomei Type-S fuel rail, and AEM 320LPH external lift pump, controlled by a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel sensor for E85 compatibility

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping, Cusco pillowball upper mounts, and Nismo R32 GT-R-specific front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) with spherical end links

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD in the rear (2.8 ratio) and Nismo 1.5-way mechanical front LSD, paired with a N1 5-speed transmission (PN: 32000-RN012) and Nismo twin-plate clutch (PN: 30100-RN000) with 800kg pressure plate
estetica: Body kit: Rocket Bunny V1 R32 widebody kit with carbon fiber front fenders, overfenders, and rear quarter panels, paired with a Veilside Fortune 03 rear bumper and custom 3M Matte Gunmetal wrap

Aero: Voltex Type-7 rear wing with 3D carbon fiber construction, adjustable angle (0-15 degrees), and integrated Gurney flap, alongside a Nismo R32 GT-R front lip spoiler (PN: 88000-RN000) and custom carbon fiber canards
Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +15 front and 18x11 +20 rear in Bronze, with custom 5x114.3 to 5x112 adapters for fitment, wrapped in Toyo R888R 275/35/18 and 305/30/18 tires

Interior: Bride Zeta III reclinable bucket seats with Takata 4-point harnesses, Nismo R32 GT-R titanium shift knob (PN: 32000-RN001), and a custom half-cage by AutoPower Industries with bolt-in X-brace for chassis rigidity
Lighting: Custom Hella 500FF headlight projectors with Morimoto HID bulbs (5500K) and GTR-specific LED halo rings, paired with Depo R32 GT-R taillights (clear lens) and custom LED turn signals
